parā-√vṛt Ā. -vartate (ind.p. -vṛtya), to turn back or round (intrans.), return, desist from (abl.),  Mn. ;  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -vartayati, to turn round (trans.),  RV. i, 38, 9  ;
cause to return,  MBh. vii, 9201  (B. pari-vartaya).
